settings.heading: From our bond to your senses
settings.subheading: Two sisters, one love for fragrance — made fresh in Egypt.

settings.heading: Two sisters, one bond
settings.text: At Sorella, we believe the best bonds are the ones we share. We're two sisters, connected not just by family but by a love for fragrance and the memories scents create. Our journey began with a simple wish: to bring people closer through scent.

settings.heading: A name that means sister
settings.text: The name Sorella reflects our sisterly bond, and it's our mission to share that connection with you. Every fragrance is crafted to evoke emotion, hold memory, and celebrate the moments that make life special.

settings.heading: Made fresh in Egypt
settings.text: Our love for perfume isn't only about beautiful scents — it's about telling stories and inspiring connection. Each fragrance reflects the closeness we share, made fresh in Egypt.

settings.heading: Made with care
settings.text: Small batches, skin-safe oils, and no animal testing — we make every bottle the way we'd make it for each other.

settings.heading: Fast local shipping
settings.text: Delivered to every governorate in Egypt in 3–7 working days.
